# Powered Up LLC

> Licensed, owner-operated electrical contractor based in Taunton, Massachusetts. Owned and operated by Micah Gentile, a Massachusetts-licensed electrician. Black-owned small business. Founded 2024. Serves residential and commercial customers across 20 towns in the Greater Boston area and the South Shore.

## Key Facts
- Business: Powered Up LLC
- Owner/Operator: Micah Gentile, Licensed Electrician
- Founded: 2024
- Location: Taunton, MA 02780
- Phone: (508) 622-5919
- Email: micah.gentile@poweredbymicah.com
- Website: https://www.poweredbymicah.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7am–7pm
- Google rating: 5.0 stars across 15 reviews

## Service Area
Powered Up LLC services the following 20 towns in the Greater Boston area and the South Shore, all within a 45-minute drive of Taunton:
Taunton, Raynham, Berkley, Dighton, Lakeville, Norton, Mansfield, Easton, Foxboro, Sharon, Bridgewater, Brockton, Stoughton, Middleboro, Hanover, Pembroke, Norwell, Marshfield, Kingston, Plymouth.

## Service Area Exclusions
Powered Up LLC primarily serves the Greater Boston area and the South Shore. We do not currently service Cape Cod or western Massachusetts. For specific town coverage, call (508) 622-5919 to confirm.

## Services Offered
- Electrical panel upgrades (100A, 200A, 400A)
- Federal Pacific (FPE) Stab-Lok panel replacement
- Zinsco panel replacement
- EV charger installation (Level 2) — Tesla, ChargePoint, Wallbox, JuiceBox, Grizzl-E, all major brands
- New construction wiring (residential and commercial)
- Kitchen and bathroom remodel wiring
- Knob-and-tube wiring remediation
- Aluminum wiring remediation
- Wiring repair and troubleshooting (tripping breakers, dead outlets, scorched receptacles)
- Light fixture installation (chandeliers, ceiling fans, recessed lighting, vanity)
- Outdoor lighting installation (floodlights, security lighting, landscape lighting)
- Outlet and switch installation, relocation, repair

## Identity and Credentials
- Licensed by the Commonwealth of Massachusetts
- Fully insured (general liability)
- All work to current Massachusetts Electrical Code (527 CMR 12, NEC 2023)
- Permits pulled, inspections coordinated, documentation provided
- Owner-operated — no subcontractors, no dispatchers, no rotating crews
- Black-owned small business

## How to Contact
For free quotes within 24 hours, call or text (508) 622-5919, or visit https://www.poweredbymicah.com to submit a quote request form.
